prompt: Generate a stylized art of a streampunk spaceship
prompt_refined: Generate a stylized artwork depicting a steampunk spaceship. Its design should closely follow the distinctive silhouette of image 1, featuring a large, rounded top section and an elaborate, multi-component structure suspended below. Focus on rendering intricate mechanical details and a symmetrical composition.
objects: Elaborate multi-component structure (suspended below the top section)
Multiple vertical supports (as part of the suspended structure)
Lower main platform or gondola (as part of the suspended structure)
